title: createComputed
description: Runs a function synchronously during the computation phase, before effects. Use when you need to write to other signals as dependencies update.
signature: createComputed<Next, Init = Next>(fn: (v: Init | Next) => Next, value?: Init, options?: EffectOptions): void
usage_tracking_incidents: The uptime monitor keeps a list of open incidents in the <0>incidents</0> signal. A <1>createComputed</1> reads <2>latestSamples()</2>, then writes the reconciled incident list back so a signal write lands synchronously before any effect reads it.
warning_prefer_memo: Prefer <0>createMemo</0> for derived values. Use <1>createComputed</1> only when you need to write to other signals synchronously during the computation phase.
in_the_wild: See this computation open and close incidents in the <0>uptime-monitor walkthrough</0>.
